title: Publish
subtitle: Prepare your book for publishing
metadata.title: Book Metadata
metadata.isbnHint: Optional. Leave blank if you don't have one yet.
cover.title: Cover Image
cover.description: Upload your book cover. JPG, PNG, or PDF — PDFs are converted automatically. Recommended minimum: 1600 × 2560px.
cover.conversionError: Couldn't read that PDF. Try a different file or export page 1 as an image.
cover.create.title: Create a cover
cover.create.description: A clean, typographic cover — title, genre, and author set in Garamond on a white background. Sized for print with bleed.
cover.create.spineWidthHint: For the print-ready PDF download (back + spine + front). Use the spine width your printer specifies for your page count. Leave 0 if you only need a front cover.
cover.create.previewEmpty: Enter a title to see a preview.
cover.create.saveError: Couldn't save the cover. Please try again.
cover.create.backEmpty: Add a Klappentext above to fill the back cover.
klappentext.title: Klappentext
klappentext.description: The back-cover blurb. Generate one from your plot board, then edit it freely.
klappentext.placeholder: A hook that makes a reader want to open the book…
klappentext.coverHint: Appears on the back panel of your generated cover.
klappentext.aiHint: Configure an AI provider in settings to generate a blurb automatically.
frontMatter.title: Front Matter
frontMatter.description: Content that appears before the first chapter.
frontMatter.prologueHint: Select a chapter to treat as a prologue. It will appear in front matter during export.
backMatter.title: Back Matter
backMatter.description: Content that appears after the last chapter.
backMatter.alsoByPlaceholder: List your other books, one per line...
backMatter.epilogueHint: Select a chapter to treat as an epilogue. It will appear in back matter during export.
